summary: A website featuring a web proxy, online games, and shows/streaming content.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dark neon-themed hero banner with abstract glowing grid lines and a subtle cityscape silhouette (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Neon-style logo mark icon with an abstract 'N' or hub symbol in cyan on dark background (nexhub-logo.dim_128x128.png)
- Placeholder game card thumbnail with a retro pixel-art controller icon on dark background (game-thumb-default.dim_400x240.png)
- Placeholder show card thumbnail with a retro film reel icon on dark background (show-thumb-default.dim_400x240.png)

existing_features.title: Design a bold, dark-themed visual identity for the site with a neon accent color scheme (e.g., electric green or cyan on near-black backgrounds), modern sans-serif typography, and a consistent card-based layout across all sections. Apply the theme globally.
Create a top navigation bar with the site logo/name and links to three main sections: Proxy, Games, and Shows. The active section should be visually highlighted.

Build a Proxy section that embeds an iframe-based web proxy allowing users to type a URL and load it inside the page. Include a URL input field, a 'Go' button, and a full-width iframe display area below the input.

Build a Games section displaying a grid of playable browser games as cards. Each card shows a game title, a thumbnail image, and a Play button. Clicking Play loads the game in an iframe overlay or dedicated view within the page. Include at least 6 game entries (e.g., Snake, Tetris, 2048, Pac-Man, Flappy Bird, Minesweeper) as embedded HTML5 or iframe games from publicly accessible sources.

Build a Shows section displaying a grid of show/video content cards. Each card shows a show title, a cover image, and a Watch button. Clicking Watch loads the video content in an embedded iframe (e.g., from a public YouTube playlist or embed URL). Include at least 6 show entries.

Create a hero/landing section at the top of the homepage with a headline, a short tagline describing the site (e.g., 'Browse freely. Play games. Watch shows.'), and quick-access buttons linking to each section.

new_feature_requests.summary: Web proxy feature for browsing anonymously or accessing blocked sites
Games section with playable online games
Shows/streaming section for watching TV shows or video content
Store a static list of games and shows in the backend as stable data records (title, description, embed URL, thumbnail URL). Expose query functions to retrieve all games and all shows.
